nasb.text: Pharaoh said to Joseph, “I have had a dream, but no one can interpret it; and I have heard it said about you, that when you hear a dream you can interpret it.”

esv.text: And Pharaoh said to Joseph, “I have had a dream, and there is no one who can interpret it. I have heard it said of you that when you hear a dream you can interpret it.”

cnv.text: 法老對約瑟說：“我作了一個夢，沒有人能夠解釋。我聽見人說，你聽了夢，就能解釋。”

ccb.text: 法老对约瑟说：“我做了一个梦，没有人能为我解梦。我听说你能解梦。”

csbs.text: 法老对约瑟说：“我做了一个梦，但无人能解。我听人说，你听了梦就能解。”
